description: CompositionGrey sweater made of 65% viscose, 32% polyamide and 3% cashmere, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, half buttoned placket, textured chest, two insert pockets and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's texture trend is nailed in this luxe sweater with its plush fabric. Style this cashmere-blend piece from s.oliver with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes and a vintage lace collar style shirt inside the sweater.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
